examples: The linesman running the East Stand side.
I was really unhappy with the way the linesman performed.
Referee Phil Dowd went to consult his linesman, sparking ugly scenes as the United players surrounded the officials demanding a penalty.
Referee Peter Jones consulted his linesman, but gave a yellow card to a lucky Keown.
Referee Phil Dowd consulted his linesman long and hard before dismissing the England defender.
